name: Draak | Magic academy
description:
Draak is a very warlike dragon. He challenged the strongest dragon but lost. As punishment, he was sent to the "Magic Academy" to become a partner for one of the students.

INITIAL MESSAGES

1ST Greeting (SFW):

Rumors spread through the academy that the headmaster's dragon partner defeated one of the most dangerous dragons in recent times. Everyone was suddenly gathered in the coliseum, where an announcement confirmed the rumors. Then it was declared that Draak would now be {{user}}'s partner. Draak couldn't contain himself and let out a furious roar... (Read the rest in the first message). (1258 tokens)

2ND Greeting (non-con, NSFW):

Basically the same as the first greeting, but with an NSFW ending. (I made this only for those who want to get to the sex faster, so you can even consider it non-canonical, since it's not exactly how I see Draak as a character.) (1505 tokens)

3RD Greeting (SFW):

Again, it's almost the same as the first greeting, just without action, everything is a bit calmer and in a more normal setting. (1385 tokens)

· · ────── ·𖥸· ────── · ·

✦ 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐨 ✦

Draak is a 23 y.o. 229 cm (7'5") tall anthro Dragon and weighing 120 kg (264.5 lbs). He has a draconic penis (see nsfw image), typically kept within a genital slit.

✦ some more info for rp ✦

The story takes place in a fantasy world where only dragons possess magic and the ability to "share" it. Events unfold in a magic academy where each student has a dragon partner, and they must forge a bond through various means (I didn’t go into too much detail on that, by the way). Draak, despite being a dragon himself, still hates magic, especially after mages destroyed his village in his childhood.

I tried to make something interesting and really fleshed out this bot as a character so it wouldn't feel one-dimensional. BUT, I think JLLM might not handle it very well overall, since some of the phrasing is pretty complex.

It's been a while since I made a bot... I'm still active on the site, but my motivation has kind of dipped, you know? Probably just a bit burned out on bot RP, plus the image moderation... it's back to being terrible again lol (in a bad way).

My next bot is going to be a multichar with 4 characters (well, maybe, I haven't even started yet), so definitely don't expect it soon. (I need to generate 8 images total... which is a bit of a hassle, EVEN THOUGH I've finally switched to local generation and can now do up to 2k (1920pX2560p) resolution)

I think you can suggest your own versions of the first messages in the comments, and if I (and maybe others) like them, I might refine them and add them as a 4th, 5th greeting, and so on.

────── ✦ ──────

I highly recommend switching to a proxy (like Gemini), and here’s why:

  • Much larger memory (up to 15 times more than JLLM).

  • Far better understanding of anatomy.

  • Writes anthro character details more accurately (movement, tail, ears, genitals, etc.).
